head.title: AERIS-10P RF Frontend Board
head.description: RF frontend: HMC451 PA, 16x HMC647A phase shifters (TX+RX), 16x HMC1040 LNA, HMC213B mixer, Wilkinson dividers. AERIS-10P Rev 1.0
head.comments: Import into EasyEDA Standard via File > Import > EasyEDA JSON

shape: T‾L‾120‾145‾0‾0.9‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 145‾Rev 1.0  |  2026-07-14  |  HMC451 PA + 32x HMC647A Phase Shifters + 16x HMC1040 LNA + HMC213B Mixer‾#555555‾
T‾L‾120‾185‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 185‾SUBSTRATE: Rogers RO4003C 0.508mm  |  50-ohm trace width: 1.08mm  |  Impedance-controlled 4-layer stackup‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾200‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 200‾WARNING: All RF traces must be 50-ohm microstrip. Minimize bends. No stubs. Ground via fence along all RF traces.‾#880000‾
T‾L‾120‾255‾0‾0.9‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 255‾U1: HMC451LS6GE  (Power Amplifier, GaAs pHEMT, X/Ku-band, +29dBm P1dB, 28dB gain, LS-6 package)‾#000066‾
T‾L‾130‾290‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 290‾RF_IN (Pin 1): from VCO via 2.92mm SMA J1‾#000066‾
T‾L‾130‾365‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 365‾Heatsink: required! 5W dissipation. Cu slug on PCB bottom.‾#000066‾
T‾L‾510‾275‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 510 275‾4-stage binary Wilkinson divider on PCB‾#000066‾
T‾L‾510‾365‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 510 365‾Total split loss: 12.04 dB ideal + ‾1 dB insertion loss = 13 dB‾#000066‾
T‾L‾510‾380‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 510 380‾Output to 16x HMC647A phase shifters via SMA launches‾#000066‾
T‾L‾130‾460‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 460‾U2-U17: HMC647ALP5E (6-bit digital phase shifter, 10-14 GHz, QFN-32 5x5mm)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾475‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 475‾Control: SPI1 bus (SPI1_SCK, SPI1_MOSI, SPI1_NSS all shared)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾490‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 490‾Daisy-chain: Data in -> U17 -> U16 -> ... -> U2 -> Data out‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾505‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 505‾All 16 share one CS line: latch simultaneously on CS rising edge‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾550‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 550‾RF IN: from Wilkinson divider output (SMA 2.92mm launch)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾565‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 565‾RF OUT: to TX antenna element (2.92mm edge SMA)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾580‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 580‾Insertion loss: 4 dB typical at 10 GHz‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾595‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 595‾Phase error: +-1.5 deg RMS (need calibration table)‾#003366‾
T‾L‾130‾718‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 718‾16 LNAs, one per RX antenna element‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾733‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 733‾RF_IN: from RX antenna element (2.92mm SMA)‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾778‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 778‾VGG: +0.3V gate bias (adjust with TrimPot for I_D=15mA)‾#660000‾
T‾L‾130‾808‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 808‾Bypass: 100nF + 10nF on VDD, 100nF on VGG per LNA‾#660000‾
T‾L‾120‾870‾0‾0.9‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 870‾U34-U49: HMC647ALP5E RX Phase Shifter Array (same as TX, 16x)‾#663300‾
T‾L‾130‾908‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 908‾RX phase shifters after LNA (maintain array beam coherence)‾#663300‾
T‾L‾130‾923‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 923‾Control: SPI2 bus (independent from TX SPI1)‾#663300‾
T‾L‾130‾938‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 938‾Output to 16:1 Wilkinson combiner (reverse of TX divider)‾#663300‾
T‾L‾510‾923‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 510 923‾Combining loss: -12.04 dB + ‾1 dB = -13 dB total‾#663300‾
T‾L‾510‾938‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 510 938‾Output to HMC213B Mixer RF input‾#663300‾
T‾L‾130‾1038‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1038‾RF_IN (Pin 1/2): from RX combiner output, ‾-35 dBm‾#006600‾
T‾L‾130‾1053‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1053‾LO_IN (Pin 5/6): from VCO via 10dB coupler, +10 dBm‾#006600‾
T‾L‾130‾1113‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 130 1113‾IF_OUT -> IF Amplifier (+20dB, BFU610F or similar)‾#006600‾
T‾L‾120‾1200‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1200‾J1: 2.92mm SMA female (RF input from VCO, +14 dBm)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1215‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1215‾J2: SMA female (LO from VCO to Mixer, +10 dBm via coupler)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1230‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1230‾J3: SMA female (IF output to ADC on main board)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1290‾0‾0.8‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1290‾J37: 30-pin FPC connector (SPI buses, GPIOs from main board)‾#333333‾
T‾L‾120‾1380‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1380‾NOTE: This board uses Rogers RO4003C substrate. Order from PCBWay with controlled impedance spec.‾#006600‾
T‾L‾120‾1400‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1400‾All RF traces: 50-ohm microstrip (width 1.08mm on 0.508mm RO4003C). Via fence along all RF traces.‾#006600‾
T‾L‾120‾1420‾0‾0.85‾‾2‾‾middle-left‾M 120 1420‾QFN packages: X-ray inspection recommended after reflow. Apply underfill on HMC647A for reliability.‾#006600‾
